title: Sword from Eve MV - Hana Arashi
description: Sword of the main character Eve MV - "Hana Arashi"
body:
3D resourse pack which changing texture of vanila swords.
![view in main hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e021357886915638a0eae8b3f62e1a8001528f6.png)

Versions prior to 1.21.5 require optifine or CIT resevn.

Rename any vanilla sword on anvil to "Arashi sword", and enjoy playing with the sword from this pack.
